basic_details.job_title: TISS Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Course Associate, Research Assistant and More Posts
basic_details.post_name: Course Associate, CTLT School Facilitator, Senior School Facilitator / Intern, Research Assistant
basic_details.short_information: The latest Tata Institute of Social Sciences (TISS) Recruitment 2026 has been announced for Course Associate, CTLT School Facilitator, Senior School Facilitator / Intern, and Research Assistant posts! Published under Advt. No. ADVT/TISS/PROJ/CETE on the official website, this recruitment drive offers 6 openings for eligible candidates. Applicants possessing a Graduation degree in any discipline or a Postgraduate degree in Education, Social Sciences, Statistics, or equivalent from recognized institutions can apply online on or before 15 June 2026. Find all details about the TISS recruitment 202

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduation in any discipline, Post graduate degree in Education, Social Sciences, Statistics or equivalent from recognized institutions
qualification.details: Course Associate: Graduation in any discipline CTLT School Facilitator: Graduation in any discipline Senior School Facilitator / Intern: Graduation in any discipline Research Assistant: Post graduate degree in Education, Social Sciences, Statistics or equivalent from recognized institutions

salary_details.details: Course Associate: Rs. 25,000/- to 30,000/- per month CTLT School Facilitator: Rs. 18,000/- to 21,000/- per month Senior School Facilitator / Intern: Rs. 25,000/- to 26,000/- per month Research Assistant: Rs. 30,000/- to Rs. 32,000/- per month

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 15-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of TISS to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the TISS Various Project Positions?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application form for the TISS Various Project Positions is 15th June 2026. Ensure your application is submitted before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What are the eligibility criteria for the TISS recruitment?
faq.answer: Eligibility criteria vary by post. Generally, candidates need a Graduation in any discipline for some roles, while others require a Post graduate degree in Education, Social Sciences, Statistics, or equivalent from recognized institutions.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available in this TISS recruitment?
faq.answer: There are a total of 6 vacancies for various project positions released by Tata Institute of Social Sciences (TISS) in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q4. What is the application fee for TISS Various Project Positions?
faq.answer: There is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary structure for the TISS project positions?
faq.answer: The salary ranges from Rs. 18,000/- to Rs. 32,000/- per month, depending on the specific post and its responsibilities.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for these TISS jobs?
faq.answer: The selection process for the TISS Various Project Positions will primarily involve an Online Interview. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their qualifications and performance in the interview.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any age limit for applying to these positions?
faq.answer: The official notification does not specify a general age limit. Candidates are advised to refer to the detailed notification for any specific age criteria or relaxation policies.

faq.question: Q8. How can I apply for the TISS recruitment?
faq.answer: Interested candidates can apply online through the official TISS website. The application process involves filling out the form, uploading necessary documents, and submitting it before the last date.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for these TISS positions?
faq.answer: The positions advertised are contractual in nature, meaning they are for a fixed term as per the project requirements.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for TISS recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification can be accessed through the TISS website. A direct link to the notification PDF is usually provided in the 'Important Links' section of recruitment announcements.
